final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand color palette and typography specification sheet for an original, non-infringing fragrance brand named "染秋 (RAN QIU)".

Style/medium: needs an East-Asian ink-and-dye craft aesthetic rooted in traditional "染" (dyeing) artistry — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a structured brand specification layout showing primary colors, secondary colors, and typography rules in clearly divided sections
Subject: must include the brand identity system for "染秋 (RAN QIU)":
  Brand concept: 东方哲学 meets seasonal nature — 秋日诗意, warmth, and 香氛艺术
  Key botanicals / ingredients: 桂花 / 柿子 / 枫叶 / 乌龙茶 / 肉桂 / 檀香 / 琥珀
  Core fragrance lines: 桂花乌龙 / 琥珀枫叶 / 柿霜暮色
Scene/backdrop: needs a refined brand-guideline document aesthetic — exact layout and paper texture are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, poetic autumn atmosphere — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: must be anchored in autumn seasonal hues drawn from 桂花 (osmanthus gold), 柿子 (persimmon orange), 枫叶 (maple red), 乌龙茶 (oolong amber), 檀香 (sandalwood beige), 琥珀 (amber deep brown) — primary and secondary color swatches with hex / color name labels; exact final values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a craft-dye and ink-wash surface quality evoking traditional 染 technique — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" and "RAN QIU" as the brand wordmark; color swatch labels in Chinese (桂花乌龙 / 琥珀枫叶 / 柿霜暮色 / 桂花 / 柿子 / 枫叶 / 乌龙茶 / 肉桂 / 檀香 / 琥珀); typography specimen showing brand typeface(s)
Constraints: must preserve the three-tier structure: 主色 (primary colors) / 辅色 (secondary colors) / 字体规范 (typography spec); all color swatches must be labeled; brand name must appear in both Chinese and Latin script
Avoid: overly modern Western minimalism that erases the 东方 craft identity; neon or cold-toned colors inconsistent with autumn warmth
